name: sharp_read_exp017
hypothesis: Phase-3 departure (## DEPARTURES): the soft GDN3 read returns a mushy average over stored associations, so the frozen LM head can't distinguish 'retrieved' from 'guessed' and takes the digit-frequency format shortcut (~0.30). ADD a sharp content-addressable within-window read (softmax over prior writes j<i by decayed q.k similarity, reading the stored value) on top of the soft read — produces a near-one-hot retrieval signal when q matches a stored key, forcing the frozen LM head to use it. Keeps the soft GDN3 read + Kronecker state + two-timescale compaction intact. If tokacc climbs past 0.30 the soft read was the bottleneck; if not, confirms the bottleneck is the proxy/loss design.
